---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new metric, flag, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What are you trying to answer or do

Describe the question this would help answer, or the workflow it would improve — not
just the feature itself.

## Have you checked these first

- [ ] `docs/methodology.md` — is this actually derivable from local `~/.codex`/`~/.claude`
      data, or does it need something (git history, self-reported input) this project
      intentionally doesn't try to approximate?
- [ ] `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/deferred-work.md` — is this already tracked
      as known/open work?

## Proposed approach

If you have one. Not required — a well-described problem is a useful issue on its own.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you looked at instead, and why it didn't fit.
